text:
6 PRs merged. We put the API docs on a diet (94KB down to 37KB) to make them easier for agents to digest, and fed some new endpoints to llm.txt while we were at it. Also fixed a CUDA hang issue so generation runs smoother, added URV AI Chat to the community showcase, and gave the README some fresh images. Building open-source infrastructure is mostly just feeding machines and keeping them from freezing. Come build with us at pollinations.ai 🐝💻

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #buildinpublic #github #devcommunity #aiart
